goal: Feel more energetic in the afternoon
Stop waking up hungry at night
constraints: Eating window: stop eating by 19:00 each day
Ingredient simplicity: prefer simple ingredients for meals
Single-serving meals: shopping and recipes that scale to single portions to avoid food waste
Flexible protein options: vegetarian or modest meat
decisions: Include low-waste tips (peels, stems, bones) in 7-day plan
Incorporate air fryer and multicooker options in 7-day plan
entities: Balcony herbs and spices from balcony garden
Impact of plating and presentation on meal enjoyment
open: Assess lasting behavior changes after meal-kit subscriptions
